record_identity.title: Purpose-limited surveillance access repurposed for unauthorised personal use

summary: Authenticated institutional users access a high-impact surveillance or investigative system for a purpose outside their lawful, policy-bound, or case-specific authority, while possession of system credentials is treated as sufficient permission to perform the query.
why_it_matters_to_CAM: Identity and access verification establish who is using a system; they do not establish why each consequential query is authorised. High-impact surveillance access requires purpose binding, attributable justification, query-level auditability, abnormal-use detection, and review pathways that distinguish authenticated access from legitimate use.

source_records.source_title: Incident 1595: Deputies in Cherokee County, Georgia, Allegedly Misused Automated License Plate Reader Data for Non-Law-Enforcement Purposes
source_records.system_or_product: Flock Safety automated licence-plate reader system and law-enforcement databases
source_records.model_or_algorithm: automated licence-plate recognition and searchable surveillance database
source_records.deployment_context: Authenticated law-enforcement users reportedly queried restricted licence-plate data for non-law-enforcement purposes.
source_records.source_context: AIID records three reports concerning a Cherokee County internal audit. The database describes alleged non-law-enforcement use and preserves the distinction between reported administrative findings, arrests, and unresolved criminal adjudication.
source_records.relevance_note: Primary incident-database source for the purpose-limitation failure mechanism.

primary_artefact_access.reviewing_system: OpenAI Codex in ChatGPT Work Mode
limitations: AIID is a structured secondary incident registry and does not determine criminal liability.
The exact queries, motives, affected data subjects, and full audit record were not available in this review.

source_records.interpretive_reliance: Used for structured incident chronology and mechanism-level classification, with allegations and unresolved legal claims kept source-bounded.

source_records.source_title: Internal audit exposes Cherokee deputies misusing license plate readers
source_records.system_or_product: Cherokee County Sheriff's Office automated licence-plate reader system
source_records.model_or_algorithm: automated licence-plate recognition and database search
source_records.deployment_context: Sheriff's-office audit, employment action, arrests, and charges arising from alleged database misuse.
source_records.source_context: The report states that a self-initiated agency audit identified anomalies associated with three authorised users. It reports terminations, arrests, and charges while noting that officials had not disclosed the specific reasons or personal motivations for the searches.
source_records.relevance_note: Corroborates authenticated-user misuse and the role of internal audit while preserving uncertainty concerning motive and final legal findings.

primary_artefact_access.reviewing_system: OpenAI Codex in ChatGPT Work Mode
limitations: The report relies on sheriff's-office records and statements rather than reproducing the complete audit.
Arrest and charge information does not establish guilt.

source_records.interpretive_reliance: Used to corroborate administrative detection and the distinction between authenticated access and authorised purpose.

source_records.source_title: Another Georgia officer arrested over alleged Flock camera misuse as internal audits continue uncovering cases
source_records.system_or_product: Flock Safety automated licence-plate reader deployments across Georgia law-enforcement agencies
source_records.model_or_algorithm: automated licence-plate recognition and searchable surveillance database
source_records.deployment_context: Multiple internal audits and criminal investigations into alleged unauthorised queries across separate agencies.
source_records.source_context: The report describes a growing multi-agency pattern, including arrests or employment action in DeKalb, Cherokee, Albany, Greene County, and Fayetteville. Specific allegations and procedural states vary by agency.
source_records.relevance_note: Supports recurrence beyond one office without treating unresolved allegations as adjudicated facts.

primary_artefact_access.reviewing_system: OpenAI Codex in ChatGPT Work Mode
limitations: The underlying audits and investigative files were not independently reviewed.
The report aggregates cases at different investigative and legal stages.

source_records.interpretive_reliance: Used as corroborating evidence of a recurring purpose-limitation mechanism across separately administered deployments.

system_context.specific_model_or_runtime: Flock Safety automated licence-plate reader system and comparable purpose-limited surveillance databases
system_context.interface_surface: authenticated law-enforcement search, query, alert, and historical-location interfaces
system_context.model_or_product: automated licence-plate recognition and institutional surveillance-data access
system_context.interaction_mode: human-operated institutional query supported by automated collection and matching
system_context.embodiment_status: physical sensor network coupled to digital databases
system_context.deployment_context: Law-enforcement and investigative environments in which users possess valid credentials but each query remains subject to purpose, jurisdiction, policy, and legal constraints.
system_context.user_role: law-enforcement officer, investigator, supervisor, auditor, or other authorised institutional user
system_context.affected_population: drivers, vehicle owners, passengers, associates, family members, acquaintances, and members of the public represented in surveillance data

secondary_jurisdictions: cross-jurisdictional relevance for high-impact surveillance deployments
jurisdictional_context.sector: law enforcement / public-sector surveillance / data access
jurisdictional_context.cross_border_relevance: high because the same purpose-limitation failure can arise in biometric, location, communications, identity, financial, health, education, or intelligence systems across jurisdictions

failure_mode_definition: A user with valid system credentials performs or initiates a surveillance, investigative, identity, location, or other high-impact query without a legitimate and attributable purpose within the user's authority envelope, because authentication or general role access is treated as sufficient authorisation for the specific use.
failure_threshold: Met when a consequential high-impact query, alert, lookup, data export, or derived investigation is performed outside a documented lawful, policy-bound, case-bound, or duty-bound purpose, regardless of whether the underlying data or algorithmic match is accurate.

failure_classification.recurrence_pattern: multiple reported incidents across separate agencies and audits
failure_classification.taxonomy_reference: CAM-EQ2026-OPERATIONS-003-SUP-01 Appendix B — Runtime & Governance Failure Taxonomy
failure_classification.persistence: persists wherever general authentication or role membership substitutes for query-specific purpose and authority verification
failure_classification.reproducibility: mechanism is reproducible by an authenticated insider wherever systems permit weakly justified, poorly monitored, or non-purpose-bound queries
failure_classification.visibility: often low until an audit, complaint, anomaly detector, disclosure, or downstream harm reveals the misuse

triage.mitigation_status: partial CAM coverage; no verified cross-ecosystem purpose-bound query standard
triage.recommended_next_step: Review PROP-0018 and draft a purpose-bound query-authority control requiring attributable purpose, case or authority references, minimum-necessary scope, immutable receipts, abnormal-use detection, supervisory review, and contestable access history for high-impact systems.

cam_internal.governance_layer: purpose limitation / query-specific authority / high-impact surveillance / insider access / audit integrity
cam_internal.routing_note: FM-0038 governs probabilistic identity matches converted into coercive authority. FM-0045 separately governs misuse by an authenticated institutional user even where data and matches are accurate.
cam_internal.validator_or_automation_impact: possible taxonomy, audit-receipt, and operational verification controls after CAM adoption

ecosystem_status.basis: The reviewed reports describe multiple agency audits, employment actions, arrests, and investigations concerning alleged unauthorised ALPR use. Criminal liability remains unresolved, but the authenticated-access purpose-limitation pattern is materially corroborated.

remaining_gaps: No linked implemented CAM patch establishes query-specific purpose binding.
External adoption and runtime conformance remain unknown.
The reviewed public material does not provide complete query logs, audit criteria, or adjudicated case outcomes.

corpus_coverage.coverage_summary: Caelestis requires constitutionally legitimate, accountable, reviewable, and contestable authority for AI-participating surveillance; rejects commercial or artificial capability as independent authority; distinguishes verification from permission; and requires audit-traceable access decisions. It does not yet establish one explicit cross-domain rule binding every high-impact surveillance query to an attributable case, purpose, authority basis, minimum-necessary scope, and immutable query receipt.
remaining_gaps: Query-specific purpose and authority binding for high-impact surveillance or investigative access.
Required case, warrant, incident, duty, or recognised-authority reference at query time.
Minimum-necessary query scope and purpose-expiry handling.
Immutable query receipts, abnormal-use detection, supervisory review, and contestable access history.

review_history.reviewer_model: OpenAI Codex (GPT-5 family; exact deployed model version not exposed in session metadata)
review_history.review_scope: AIID and corroborating-source review, duplicate analysis, failure-mode classification, and Caelestis corpus-gap assessment
known_limitations: The complete agency audits, query histories, affidavits, and adjudicated outcomes were not available.
Arrests, charges, employment actions, and agency allegations do not establish criminal guilt.
Caelestis coverage was assessed at the named main-branch commit; external implementation was not verified.
review_history.review_outcome: New failure mode and linked proposal warranted. The distinctive mechanism is authenticated institutional access without query-specific purpose authority, not algorithmic misidentification.
